signals.headline: Solana Stablecoin Volume Hit Record $650 Billion in February 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Stablecoin Volume Hit Record $650 Billion in February 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Transactions marked a new monthly high, nearly tripling January activity, with ~2 trillion overall stablecoin transfers estimated[1]. Anticipated March surge due to geopolitical factors adds momentum[1]. Reinforces network utility, aligning with bullish Polymarket odds for SOL >$80 (87-100%)[2][7].
